# @mezzanine-ui/icons

> SVG icon definitions for Mezzanine UI — plain JavaScript objects that are passed to the `<Icon>` component from @mezzanine-ui/react.

## Purpose

Each icon is a plain object of type `IconDefinition` (not a React component). This keeps the package framework-agnostic. To render an icon in React, pass it to the `Icon` component from `@mezzanine-ui/react`.

## Usage

```tsx
import { PlusIcon, CloseIcon, CheckedFilledIcon } from '@mezzanine-ui/icons';
import Icon from '@mezzanine-ui/react/Icon';

<Icon icon={PlusIcon} />
<Icon icon={CloseIcon} color="error" />
<Icon icon={CheckedFilledIcon} />
```

The `Icon` component accepts `icon`, `color`, and `size` props. See `@mezzanine-ui/react` for full prop documentation.

## Icon Categories

| Category     | Example exports                                                                     |
| ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **System**   | `MenuIcon`, `SearchIcon`, `UserIcon`, `CalendarIcon`, `NotificationIcon`, `HomeIcon`, `SpinnerIcon` |
| **Arrow**    | `CaretDownIcon`, `ChevronRightIcon`, `LongTailArrowLeftIcon`, `SwitchVerticalIcon`  |
| **Controls** | `CloseIcon`, `PlusIcon`, `MinusIcon`, `TrashIcon`, `EyeIcon`, `FilterIcon`, `LockIcon` |
| **Alert**    | `CheckedFilledIcon`, `ErrorFilledIcon`, `WarningFilledIcon`, `InfoFilledIcon`, `DangerousFilledIcon` |
| **Content**  | `EditIcon`, `DownloadIcon`, `UploadIcon`, `CopyIcon`, `FileIcon`, `StarFilledIcon`, `MailIcon` |
| **Stepper**  | `Item0Icon` – `Item9Icon` (numeric step indicators)                                 |

## All Named Exports

See `packages/icons/src/index.ts` for the authoritative list of all ~110 exported icon definitions.

## Type

```ts
import type { IconDefinition } from '@mezzanine-ui/icons';
```

An `IconDefinition` is a plain object — it is safe to store in constants, pass as props, or serialize.

## GitHub

https://github.com/Mezzanine-UI/mezzanine/tree/main/packages/icons
